name: linkedin-feed-blocker
description: Browser extension that blocks the LinkedIn home feed while keeping the rest of LinkedIn usable. Firefox-first, Chrome/Edge/Safari compatible.

scripts.sign:unlisted: npm run build:firefox && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && npx --yes web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --channel=unlisted --artifacts-dir dist/signed
scripts.sign:listed: npm run build:firefox && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && npx --yes web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --channel=listed --artifacts-dir dist/signed --amo-metadata amo-metadata.json
